
● Analyzing the repository structure to understand what files need to be updated...

Reading src/waggle/server.py to understand the current implementation.

I can see the server.py imports from waggle.tmux — let me check the tmux module to
understand what functions are available before making changes.

The current implementation uses subprocess.run() for tmux interactions. The plan is
to migrate all of these to libtmux for a cleaner interface.

Let me start by updating the get_sessions function to use libtmux's Session objects
instead of raw subprocess calls. This will give us proper error handling and a more
Pythonic API.

Here's the updated implementation:
